sub_tasks.desc: Coder Agent: Develop standardized login UI components mapping credentials entry and social SSO fields via Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI.
Coder Agent: Build centralized API client interceptor capture mechanisms mapping web token storage inside Axios transport layers.
Tester Agent: Author component interaction specs rendering form behaviors and validation feedback handling parameters.
Bug Fixer Agent: Validate frontend component compilation against strict Next.js App Router rules and check strict multi-tenant isolation gates.
Documentation Agent: Compile state storage management guidelines, dynamic cookie storage paths, and network interceptor protocols.
Coder Agent & Tester Agent: Construct QuarkusComponentTest boundary validation suites mocking JWT signature validation behaviors.
Tester Agent: Author client UI verification scenarios using Jest and React Testing Library for credential rejections and fallback routes.
Bug Fixer Agent: Trigger native maven compilation ('mvn clean test-compile'), catch dependency or syntax anomalies, and execute auto-patch iterations.
Documentation Agent: Record mock structural policies ensuring independent execution capabilities during pipeline integration scans.
Coder Agent: Implement cryptographic data processing layers using symmetric AES-256-GCM encryption wrappers for transient secure strings.
Tester Agent: Deploy rigorous validation suites asserting decryption accuracy and cryptographic format constraints.
Bug Fixer Agent: Run java test compiling, capture entity filter validation errors or security claims exceptions, and patch code rules.
Documentation Agent: Document bitwise package serialization layouts and dynamic time-window validation safety rules.

Coder Agent: Expose non-blocking REST endpoints consuming dynamic barcodes and enforcing transaction filtering via composite keys to guarantee processing idempotency. Decorate resources using strict OpenAPI @Operation and @APIResponse annotations.
Tester Agent: Model mock concurrent multi-thread requests to verify soft success fallback handling on identical date matches.
Bug Fixer Agent: Intercept compiler or test errors, apply automated code repairs with real-time logs, and monitor structural compilation boundaries.
Documentation Agent: Formulate endpoint payload documentation tables, network transaction status charts, and API response error matrices.
Coder Agent: Map persistent domain abstractions, entities, and repositories for sys_promotions and notification_delivery_logs, and implement gym countdown logic dynamically at runtime.
Tester Agent: Author domain lifecycle assertions evaluating active, expiring (<=3 days), and dead state boundaries.
Bug Fixer Agent: Execute project validation checks, catch entity filter validation errors or mapping mismatches, and patch repository files.
Documentation Agent: Chart entity relation graphs, runtime calculation strategies, and tracking flag definitions.
Coder Agent: Architect mobile dashboard viewports featuring live barcode painters and warning panels wrapped within Tailwind Safe Area and Capacitor notch constraints.
Tester Agent: Deploy interface testing mocks verifying accurate multi-language string transformations and layout threshold handling across mobile screen frames.
Bug Fixer Agent: Run TypeScript compilation, catch layout bounds layout mismatches, and fix styling rules dynamically.
Documentation Agent: Record UI style mappings, notch containment rules, and offline local device interaction frameworks.
